SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-22-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-22-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF/CROSS-DEFENDANT AUSHANTEE MCCLINTON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT/CROSS-COMPLAINANT LORETO SOLIS IS PRESENT WITH MICHAEL GREEN, FARMERS INSURANCE REPRESENTATIVE. PLAINTIFF/CROSS-DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE ON THE CROSS-COMPLAINT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-22-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-22-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF/CROSS-DEFENDANT AUSHANTEE MCCLINTON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT/CROSS-COMPLAINANT LORETO SOLIS IS PRESENT WITH MICHAEL GREEN, FARMERS INSURANCE REPRESENTATIVE. PLAINTIFF/CROSS-DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE ON THE CROSS-COMPLAINT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-22-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCCLINTON, AUSHANTEE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SOLIS, LORETO AKA LORENZO SOLIS $1,806.44 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,921.44 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-22-2017 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT SOLIS, LORETO AKA LORENZO SOLIS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT MCCLINTON, AUSHANTEE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT SOLIS, LORETO AKA LORENZO SOLIS
